description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsRed tri fold wallet with a flap and click clasp closure,  that has a zipped compartment, an inner pocket with four card holders on the left, two insert pockets with seven card holders and one id card holder on the right,  zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name on the click closureMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:10 cm x 20 cm
